keywords: platform only QR token generation validation security F275 trust boundary not injectable
ironRules: F275 IQRService is PLATFORM-ONLY — no tenant factory swap permitted for T102 or T103
Tenant-provided QR implementation enables token forgery — platform control is non-negotiable
Contrast: F281 (payout) is INJECTABLE for business reasons; F275 is PLATFORM-ONLY for security
Any INJECTABLE declaration of F275 is a BUILD_FAILURE per CF-09-6
